msg: warning: Variable buf is freed although not dynamically allocted!
reasoning: Same file and same bug location as FAMILY_76/FAMILY_77, now reported as static_free: 'buf is freed although not dynamically allocated' at line 31. When cmd==8 causes 'goto all_done' to bypass 'buf = malloc(bufsize)' at line 26, buf is uninitialized and thus was never heap-allocated. Calling free(buf) on an uninitialized (non-malloc'd) pointer is undefined behavior — the static_free characterization is an approximation of the underlying uninitialized-pointer-free issue, but the core observation (free called on non-dynamically-allocated memory) is correct. The vbdb marks line 31 with '//ERROR'. Presence condition def(CONFIG_FEATURE_CLEAN_UP) correctly matches the #ifdef guard. Known bug.
